_README: Per-task, per-object APPEARANCE config for scene_builder.py (applied at scene
build time, unlike task_data/object_physics/<task>.json which is baked offline).
Object keys match a file/object-name suffix; the longest matching key wins,
and each entry is merged over '_defaults'.
visible  : false to hide the object's render (physics still applies).
texture  : path to a .png/.jpg image. Absolute, or relative to this file's
NOTE: these exported meshes have no UV coordinates, so a texture
samples ~one color; 'color' is used as the fallback/ tint.
color    : [r, g, b] in 0..1, used when there is no texture (or as fallback).
